sessions.title: Cielo modernized its data platform and migrated 6,000+ pipelines from EMR to Databricks.
sessions.body: Cielo, a leading LATAM payment processor, operated a fragmented analytics landscape across AWS EMR, Oracle Exadata/DW, and decentralized governance. sessions.body: Learn how to construct clean, correct, cost-conscious CDC pipelines that conquer chaotic change, column creep, and complicated SCD calculations. What works in development often breaks under real production conditions.Spark Declarative Pipelines (SDP) addresses this with Auto CDC, a declarative API that abstracts away merge orchestration…

With Lakebridge, AI agents handle that automatically. sessions.body: Building an app has never been easier. Deploying an enterprise app— governed, scalable, connected to real-time data— has never been harder. Store associates, restaurant managers, and operations teams make thousands of decisions a day— but the apps they rely on are slow to build, disconnected from analytics, and starved of real-time context. The reason? A wall between analytical and operational systems that forces teams to maintain fragile ETL pipelines, over-provision databases, and wait months for production-ready tools.Lakebase tears that wall down. sessions.title: Control and governing your coding agents with LLMOps
sessions.body: Coding agents like Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini CLI are transforming how software gets built, but without observability they remain a black box. This talk shows how to take control of your coding agents using MLflow. We cover tracing agent sessions to understand token usage and tool calls, evaluating output quality with LLM judges and custom scorers, routing LLM traffic through AI Gateway for cost control, and automating workflows with MCP and skills. Walk away with practical techniques to monitor, measure, and maximize your coding agent investment.

sessions.title: Cost Governance at Scale @ Databricks
sessions.body: "With great compute power comes great financial responsibility." As the internal Data Platform team, we manage one of the largest Databricks environments in the world—which means we also manage one of the largest cloud bills. This session unveils our internal FinOps practices. We will demonstrate how we use System Tables, budgets, and tagging policies to attribute costs to hundreds of internal teams, identify waste, and enforce accountability. Learn how to implement the same governance controls that we use to keep our finance team happy while empowering 10,000+ employees to innovate.

sessions.title: Cross-Cloud Delta Sharing: Eliminate Egress cost with Delta Sharing Global Distribution
sessions.body: Cross-cloud and cross-region data sharing introduces egress costs that grow with recipient query volume, creating a scaling challenge for large-scale data providers. This session covers best practices for architecting cost-efficient Delta Sharing deployments across clouds and regions, and introduces a new Databricks capability designed to change how providers manage cross-cloud/region delivery at scale.

sessions.title: Data Analytics with Multi-Modal Data
sessions.body: AI is becoming a very powerful commodity tool to turn unstructured data into structured data. This has greatly improved the importance of unstructured data and is posing new challenges in the world of data analytics: how to govern the data, how to store the data, how to access the data efficiently, and how to make the data available to ML models. In this talk, we will discuss how we're approaching these problems given the state of the world with open table formats such as Delta Lake and Apache Iceberg, as well as new file formats such as LanceDB.

Drawing on real-world pipelines I’ve built, I show how manipulative techniques can be operationalized as measurable indicators within AI evaluation workflows.
